backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Sanctuary data store with functions to add, retrieve, and filter sanctuaries by day, month, year, or all entries using a hash map keyed by name+date.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping visual effect features (muzzle flash, explosion, cursed energy aura, shockwave, projectile trails) to their implementing source files and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering CSS, hooks, components, utilities, and types for the fighting game and calendar app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Calendar & Sanctuaries App' that mounts the React app via a root div and module script pointing to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering the UG vs Sukuna fighting game layout with a styled header, the FightingGame component as main content, and a caffeine.ai attribution footer.
frontend/src/components/AddSanctuaryDial: Empty file placeholder for the AddSanctuaryDialog component.
frontend/src/components/Calendar.tsx: Empty file placeholder for the Calendar component.
frontend/src/components/Character3D.tsx: React Three Fiber components rendering detailed multi-part 3D characters for UG (blue armored warrior) and Sukuna, with articulated meshes, emissive materials, and attack/hit animation support.
frontend/src/components/FightingGame.tsx: Main fighting game component orchestrating the game loop, player physics, enemy AI, projectile firing and hit detection, and visual effect event tracking (muzzle flash, explosions, landing shockwaves, damage flash) rendered via Scene3D.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Empty file placeholder for the Header component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Empty file placeholder for the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/OnScreenControls: Renders touch/mouse on-screen game controls (movement, jump, attack buttons) that update a shared KeyState ref. Includes SVG icons for punch, kick, and gun actions.
frontend/src/components/ParticleSystem3D: Renders up to 200 game particles using two Three.js InstancedMeshes (spheres for impact flares, boxes for sparks) with scale-up-then-shrink animation and boosted color saturation.
frontend/src/components/Scene3D.tsx: Composes the 3D game scene with player/enemy characters, particles, background scenery (ruined pillars, walls, energy effects), and a pulsing floor glow using React Three Fiber.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendarState.ts: React hook managing calendar view state (month/year navigation) and computing a 42-day grid of CalendarDay objects with week numbers, today highlighting, and month membership.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameLoop.ts: React hook that drives a game loop via requestAnimationFrame, calling update with a capped deltaTime and a render function each frame while the loop is running.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useKeyboardControls.t: React hook that tracks keyboard input state (movement, punch, kick, shoot) using event listeners and returns a ref containing the current key states.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating Sanctuary data from an ICP backend actor, including helpers to convert between JS Dates and nanosecond bigints.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a dark fighting-game-themed OKLCH color palette with custom component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the game, including enums for game status, attack types, and facing direction, plus interfaces for characters, enemies, projectiles, particles, and game state.
frontend/src/utils/combatSystem.ts: Handles combat logic including melee hit detection between player and enemy, projectile-enemy collision, damage application, knockback, and hit particle spawning.
frontend/src/utils/enemyAI.ts: Updates enemy AI each frame, managing state transitions between approach, attack, retreat, and stagger behaviors based on distance to the player, with gravity and wall bounds applied.
frontend/src/utils/gamePhysics.ts: Provides physics utilities for player movement including gravity, jumping, horizontal motion, wall bounds, attack timing, attack hitbox calculation, and rectangle overlap detection.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, fighting-game-specific fonts, glow box shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state (version 15) for a 3D fighting game featuring UG vs Sukuna enemies, documenting existing features, requirements, and architectural notes including touch controls, health bars, guns, and 3D rendering.
